title: cineraria decipiens
intro: Cineraria decipiens, also known as Cape marigold, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cineraria decipiens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve eye health, and support skin health. In herbal preparations, Cineraria decipiens is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
